title: Optimize upload flow, center-align menu items, and update post control icons

requirements.summary: Add comprehensive error handling to useCreatePost mutation hook to catch and display clear error messages for network errors, authorization failures, and validation errors
acceptanceCriteria: Error messages are displayed to users when upload fails
Different error types (network, auth, validation) show specific messages
Users can understand what went wrong and how to fix it

file_operations.description: Enhance the useCreatePost mutation hook with comprehensive error handling that catches different error types (network errors, authorization failures, validation errors) and displays user-friendly error messages using toast notifications

requirements.summary: Add loading state indicators to post creation form showing when a post is being submitted, disabling the submit button during upload, and providing visual feedback
acceptanceCriteria: Submit button is disabled while upload is in progress
Loading spinner or indicator is visible during submission
Form fields are disabled during submission to prevent duplicate submissions

file_operations.description: Add loading state UI to the post creation form by using the mutation's isPending state to disable the submit button, display a loading spinner, and disable form fields during submission to prevent duplicate submissions

requirements.summary: Add retry logic with exponential backoff to useCreatePost mutation to automatically retry failed uploads up to 3 times before showing an error
acceptanceCriteria: Failed uploads are automatically retried up to 3 times
Retry delays increase exponentially (e.g., 1s, 2s, 4s)
Error is only shown after all retry attempts are exhausted

file_operations.description: Add retry logic to the useCreatePost mutation using TanStack Query's retry configuration with exponential backoff (retry: 3, retryDelay: attemptIndex => Math.min(1000 * 2 ** attemptIndex, 30000)) to automatically retry failed uploads up to 3 times with increasing delays

requirements.summary: Add form validation to post creation form that validates required fields before submission and displays inline validation errors
acceptanceCriteria: Required fields show error messages if empty on submit
Image URL is validated as a proper URL format when provided
Form cannot be submitted until all validation passes

file_operations.description: Add client-side form validation for required fields (title, description, content) that displays inline error messages below each field when validation fails, validates image URL format when provided, and prevents form submission until all validation passes

requirements.summary: Update useCreatePost mutation to automatically invalidate and refetch posts query after successful post creation ensuring the new post appears immediately
acceptanceCriteria: New posts appear in the homepage list immediately after creation
No manual page refresh is required to see new posts
Post list is sorted correctly with newest posts first

file_operations.description: Add onSuccess callback to the useCreatePost mutation that calls queryClient.invalidateQueries for the 'posts' query key to automatically refetch the posts list after successful post creation, ensuring new posts appear immediately in the homepage

requirements.summary: Add success toast notification that displays when a post is successfully created providing clear feedback that the upload completed
acceptanceCriteria: Success message displays when post is created
Message confirms the post was saved successfully
Toast notification auto-dismisses after a few seconds

file_operations.description: Add success toast notification using the toast function from the existing Toaster component that displays when the mutation succeeds, showing a message like 'Post created successfully!' that auto-dismisses after a few seconds

requirements.summary: Update three-dot menu dropdown to center-align all menu items (Home, Contact Us, Privacy Policy) vertically for a clean, centered list presentation
acceptanceCriteria: All menu items are center-aligned horizontally in the dropdown
Alignment is consistent across all menu items
Menu maintains clean, polished appearance

file_operations.description: Update the Sheet component's mobile menu section to center-align all menu items (Home, Contact Us, Privacy Policy) by adding text-center class to the SheetContent or individual menu item links

requirements.summary: Replace existing Edit icon button with a pencil icon (using lucide-react Pencil component), maintaining position at top of post card, developer-only visibility, and all existing edit functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Edit button displays a pencil icon instead of current icon
Icon is positioned at the top of the post card
Only visible to authenticated admin users
Clicking opens the edit dialog with pre-filled post data

file_operations.description: Replace the existing Edit icon button with the Pencil icon from lucide-react while maintaining its position at the top of the post card, admin-only visibility check, and all existing edit functionality including opening the EditPostDialog with pre-filled data

requirements.summary: Replace existing Delete icon button with a trash/delete icon (using lucide-react Trash2 component), maintaining position at top of post card, developer-only visibility, and all existing delete functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Delete button displays a trash icon instead of current icon
Icon is positioned at the top of the post card
Only visible to authenticated admin users
Clicking opens the delete confirmation dialog

file_operations.description: Replace the existing Delete icon button with the Trash2 icon from lucide-react while maintaining its position at the top of the post card, admin-only visibility check, and all existing delete functionality including opening the DeletePostDialog confirmation
